localStorageKeys.role: full local canvas fallback snapshot written by VisualCanvasWorkspace
cached server canvas for fast open
local draft fallback before/after server save
route hint for /create without query string
route/session hint for the last workflow

cannotRecoverReasons.unrecoverable_blob_url: Only a browser blob URL was saved; it is gone after refresh.
cannotRecoverReasons.unrecoverable_expired_signed_url_without: Only an expired provider/object-store signed URL was saved; no durable storageKey exists.
cannotRecoverReasons.unrecoverable_provider_expired: Provider URL cannot be downloaded and no retrievable provider job result is available.
cannotRecoverReasons.unrecoverable_provider_retrieve_not_impl: Provider job id exists but the adapter cannot retrieve historical output.
cannotRecoverReasons.unrecoverable_no_record: No assetId, storageKey, usable URL, dataUrl, or providerJobId was saved.
